channel.title: Competencies on CSC324 Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Competencies on CSC324 Portfolio

item.title: Evaluation
item.description: Conducted a task-based user study to evaluate our functional MVP course planner.

item.title: Medium-Scale Abstraction
item.description: Designed a unified requirement_blocks table to abstract all major graduation requirements across 12 majors in a multi-major planner.

item.title: Medium-Scale Architecture
item.description: Designed a normalized relational database architecture to support a multi-major degree planner at Grinnell College.

item.title: Needfinding
item.description: Conducted a semi-structured interview to discover user needs around course planning at Grinnell College.

item.title: Prototyping
item.description: Designed and tested a hand-drawn prototype to explore degree requirement visibility and course planning across multiple years.

item.title: Self-Learning: SQL to React Tutorial
item.description: Reflection on building a tech tutorial connecting SQL to React through a backend API.

item.title: Tutorial: Linking SQL to React
item.description: A step-by-step guide to connecting a SQL database to a React frontend through a backend API.
